title: PhishGuard AI
summary: Archived capstone project: an AI-assisted email phishing filter that analyzes messages, extracts security evidence, scores phishing likelihood, and routes outcomes into safe, review, or quarantine paths.

logs.title: Built initial AI triage, validation, and routing policy
logs.details: Implemented the first AI triage pipeline with strict JSON validation, safe fallback behavior, OpenAI client abstraction, and deterministic SAFE, REVIEW, and QUARANTINE routing policy.

logs.title: Added live IMAP mailbox scanning and audit logging
logs.details: Merged the live mailbox runner with UID-based new message tracking, one-shot and polling modes, server-side review/quarantine routing, and structured JSONL audit records.

logs.title: Merged v0.6 capstone stabilization work
logs.details: Brought the larger v0.6 update into main, preserving the completed capstone state with expanded project structure, GUI/backend alignment, review queue behavior, and documentation support.

archivedNotes: Completed as a school capstone project by Team Sentinel AI Labs.
Preserved as portfolio evidence of applied email security, AI-assisted triage, audit logging, and GUI/backend integration work.
No longer treated as an active development project.
